basicInfo.name: Nightmare Rudy
basicInfo.flavor: As the Knight of Light and the long-standing protector of the Mystic Woods, Rudy is acknowledged as the High Guardian by the people.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 50% of Physical Attack plus 60% of Defense 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 50% of Physical Attack.
 - Increases Damage: To 60% of Magic Attack.

Skill 1.name: Charge
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - 100% chance to inflict Buff Duration Reduction. [Reduced by: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Deals damage equal to 170% of Physical Attack plus 195% of Defense 1 time(s).
 - 85% chance to inflict Stun. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 170% of Physical Attack.
 - Increases Damage: To 195% of Magic Attack.

Skill 2.name: Raise Shield
Skill 2.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants Link. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Grants 1 Debuff Removal(s).

Passive.name: Steadfast Shield
Passive.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants Defense Boost. [Always Active]
 - Self
 - Grants Damage Resistance. [Always Active]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Defense Reduction to 20%.

profile.story:
When the Power of Destruction swept across the continent, the king and nobles of the Terra Kingdom abandoned their people, using them as shields while scrambling to save themselves.
With no end to the monster attacks, the villages on the outskirts refused to pay taxes to rulers who wouldn't offer them any protection.
Then, Rudy rose to action.
Freshly graduated from the Luxtov Knight Academy, Rudy displayed unmatched strength and leadership, saving countless villages.
In response, the crown granted him a hollow lord title and ordered him to collect taxes from the very villages he had just saved.
But how could he demand taxes from those who had lost their families and the means to farm because of the rampaging monsters?
Rudy defied the order.
The nobles, who had always despised the idea of an orphan of war being granted a title, seized the chance to act against him.
Threatened with imprisonment, Rudy turned to the temple of Goddess Elena.
He asked her the questions that he'd been asking himself. What is justice? What is Light?
What should he do?
He sought answers, but the goddess gave none.
At that moment, a pair of white wings spread from Rudy's back.
Awestruck by the sight of them, the people rallied to his side, and the villages around the Mystic Woods pledged their loyalty to him.
With this immense support and the absolute trust of the people, Rudy was no longer a mere figurehead lord.
